title: Drawer / Sheet
description: Overlay panel that slides from an edge (often mobile navigation or settings). Behaves like a dialog when modal.

props.name: modal
props.description: When true, background is inert and focus is trapped.

props.name: dismissible
props.description: Whether ESC and overlay click close the drawer.

states.name: open
effects: Slides in; background may be inert; focus managed.

keyboard: On open, move focus into the drawer (title or first focusable).
If modal, trap focus inside; Esc closes if dismissible.
On close, return focus to the opener.
aria: If modal, use role="dialog" and aria-modal="true".
Provide aria-labelledby (title) or aria-label as fallback.

must: Drawer must be operable by keyboard only.
Focus management must be correct (return focus on close).
should: Avoid drawers for complex multi-step flows; use full pages or dialogs.
must_not: Do not allow focus behind a modal drawer.

token_usage.notes: Use surface background for drawer container.
Use overlay shadow for sliding panel.
Use enter motion token for slide-in.
